name: verify_session
description: Verify a Clerk session token to confirm it is valid and not expired. Returns the full session object including the associated user ID, status, and expiration time. Use this to authenticate incoming requests in your backend by validating the session token passed from the frontend.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The Clerk session ID to verify. Starts with 'sess_'. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The session JWT token to verify. This is the token that was issued to the client.
